source: mywaste.ie + panda.ie signup flow (Grange, Co. Sligo), donegalwasterecycle.wis.ie (O'Connell St, Sligo), barnarecycling.com (areas page + signup portal)

companies.name: Panda Green

confidence.reason: Pricing retrieved directly from panda.ie signup flow for 1 Main Street, Grange, Co. Sligo. Sligo-specific pricing — differs from Mayo/Roscommon. Unlimited recycling and compost allowances (unlike other counties).

companies.service_notes: Serves Co. Sligo. Unlimited recycling and compost on flat plans (unlike other counties). No glass bin. Compost rollout ongoing in rural areas. Fortnightly collection.

plans.name: Essential
plans.notes: €31.50/month. 46kg monthly waste allowance, €0.25/kg excess. Unlimited recycling and compost. No glass bin. For 1-3 people.

plans.name: Standard
plans.notes: €35.00/month. Most popular plan. 59kg monthly waste allowance, €0.25/kg excess. Unlimited recycling and compost. No glass bin. For 3-5 people.

plans.name: Plus
plans.notes: €41.00/month. 85kg monthly waste allowance, €0.25/kg excess. Unlimited recycling and compost. No glass bin. For 5+ people.

plans.name: Pay Per Lift
plans.notes: €12.00/month service charge + per-lift: Waste €16.00/lift (up to 50kg, €0.20/kg excess), Recycling €5.25/lift (up to 25kg, €0.25/kg excess), Compost €6.50/lift (up to 50kg, €0.20/kg excess). No glass bin.

companies.name: Donegal Waste & Recycle

confidence.reason: Pricing retrieved from donegalwasterecycle.wis.ie for O'Connell St, Sligo (price_group_ids=1). Company website has dedicated Sligo service page. Based in Co. Donegal; serves border counties including Sligo.

companies.service_notes: Based in Co. Donegal. Serves Sligo. Quarterly weight allowances on waste bin; excess at €0.25/kg. Government levy of €0.01135/kg applies to waste lifts. One-off €40 bin delivery charge on Pre Pay plans. Compost caddy (25L) included. Fortnightly collection.

plans.name: Standard 240 + 240 + Caddy
plans.notes: €34/month (€408/year). 240L waste + 240L recycling + 25L compost caddy. 210kg waste allowance per quarter (~70kg/month), €0.25/kg excess.

plans.name: Mix 240 Waste + 120 Recycle + Caddy
plans.notes: €31/month (€372/year). 240L waste + 120L recycling + 25L compost caddy. 210kg waste allowance per quarter (~70kg/month), €0.25/kg excess.

plans.name: Standard 120 + 120 + Caddy
plans.notes: €27/month (€324/year). 120L waste + 120L recycling + 25L compost caddy. 105kg waste allowance per quarter (~35kg/month), €0.25/kg excess.

plans.name: Mix 120 Waste + 240 Recycle + Caddy
plans.notes: €31/month (€372/year). 120L waste + 240L recycling + 25L compost caddy. 105kg waste allowance per quarter (~35kg/month), €0.25/kg excess.

plans.name: 2x240 Waste + 240 Recycle + Caddy
plans.notes: €52/month (€624/year). 2x 240L waste + 240L recycling + 25L compost caddy. 420kg waste allowance per quarter (~140kg/month), €0.25/kg excess.

plans.name: Pre Pay Top Up
plans.notes: €5/month service charge + per-lift: Waste €13/lift (up to 40kg, €0.25/kg excess), Recycling €8/lift, Compost €5/lift. Government levy €0.01135/kg on waste. €40 one-off bin delivery. 240L waste + 240L recycling + 25L compost caddy.

plans.name: Pre Pay Annual
plans.notes: €60/year (~€5/month) annual service charge + per-lift: Waste €13/lift (up to 40kg, €0.25/kg excess), Recycling €8/lift, Compost €5/lift. Government levy €0.01135/kg on waste. €40 one-off bin delivery. 240L waste + 240L recycling + 25L compost caddy.

companies.name: Barna Recycling

confidence.reason: Barna Recycling's 'Areas We Service' page confirms Galway, Sligo and Leitrim coverage. A dedicated Sligo depot exists at Finisklin Road, Sligo (phone 071 9154532). However, the signup portal (cportal.barnarecycling.com) returns no plans for any Sligo locality tried (Sligo, Ballymote, Tubbercurry, Strandhill, Rosses Point, Collooney). No online pricing available — customers must sign up via phone.

companies.service_notes: Serves Co. Sligo with dedicated Sligo depot. Online signup portal has no plans configured for Sligo — contact the Sligo depot directly on 071 9154532 to sign up.

companies.name: McGrath Industrial Waste Ltd.

confidence.reason: McGrath serves Mayo and Sligo per their website. No online pricing published — customers must request a quote.

companies.service_notes: Based in Castlebar, Co. Mayo. Serves Mayo and Sligo. No online pricing available — contact by phone.

companies.name: Oxigen Environmental Unlimited Company

confidence.reason: Oxigen WIS portal (oxigen.wis.ie) session was loaded with a Westmeath area search from prior county. Oxigen primarily serves Leinster and Midlands — Co. Sligo in northwest Connacht is outside their typical service area. Not verified via eircode check.

companies.service_notes: Does not appear to serve Co. Sligo.
